## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - SEO performance shows 34% growth in engaged sessions, with AI mentions increasing from \<1% to \>3% of sessions
  - [Content strategy focuses on niche keywords, vertical-specific articles, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Website improvements discussed: removing dates from articles, potential platform migration, and enhancing article templates](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Need for better categorization and tagging of articles for improved content organization](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Content Strategy

  - [34% growth in engaged sessions, slight correction from previous week](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - AI mentions increased from \<1% in July to \>3% in September
  - [Focus on niche keywords (e.g., Hydrocracker use, operational excellence for cement plants)](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Creating vertical-specific content (e.g., polyethylene, polypropylene within polymers)](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [High CTR for niche topics like copper processing](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Website Improvements and Challenges

  - [Dates removed from articles, kept on blogs](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Potential migration to a new website platform in the future](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Discrepancy between Figma template and actual WordPress implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Need for better categorization and tagging of articles (currently one overall category)](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Discussion on programmatic vs. manual selection of related articles](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Content Review and Approval Process

  - [Current process doesn't involve Imubit reviewing all content before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on reviewing high-traffic articles and middle-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Caution advised when involving product team in content review to avoid over-scrutiny](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

### Asset Sharing and Product Updates

  - [Request for access to gated content without going through lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Plans to build a library of product images for external use](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Upcoming product video (2-minute feature highlight) to be released](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tara to obtain and share the AFPM Operational Planning guide with the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Dan to release the new product feature video](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [GrowthX to make explicit action items and requests in Slack for easy reference](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Consider implementing tags for better content categorization in the future](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue focusing on top-of-funnel content, with plans to involve Imubit more in middle-of-funnel content review](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Imubit to share any identified "no-go" areas or inaccuracies to improve content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/sUwLrPifZY22woSjPx_3hDkgBvE7zMza?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
